nasb.text: Then He gave them into the hand of the nations, And those who hated them ruled over them.

esv.text: he gave them into the hand of the nations, so that those who hated them ruled over them.

cnv.text: 把他們交在外族人的手裡， 恨惡他們的人就管轄他們。

ccb.text: 使他们落在列邦的手中， 受敌人的辖制。

csbs.text: 把他们交在列国的手中， 恨他们的人就管辖他们。
